$comment: SEED of the future Phase-3 config engine. Only surfaces that exist in code today are listed here — no speculative rapid/pro entries (index.ts's CATEGORY_MAP has no such bundles yet). Runtime filters (npm-package/src/index.ts CATEGORY_MAP, hosted-server/vercel/api/mcp.ts TOOLS array) do NOT read this file yet — that refactor is a later Phase-3 chunk. Today this manifest is read ONLY by scripts/check-hosted-drift.mjs, which fails loudly if hosted's hand-curated TOOLS array silently drifts from the list below.

hosted-15.description: mcp.novada.com default surface — verbatim from the hand-curated TOOLS array in hosted-server/vercel/api/mcp.ts (const TOOLS = [...], ~lines 367-411), which the source itself comments is a 'standalone curation, NOT derived from core's TOOLS'
